articles.title: THEM LEGALLY
articles.summary: Criminal hacker group USDoD has allegedly leaked 2.7BN records of personal information — including names, addresses, dates of birth, Social Security numbers, and phone numbers.

articles.title: Get 60% off with code TLDRAI
ADOBE PREVIEWS ITS UPCOMING FIREFLY VIDEO MODEL
articles.summary: Adobe's Firefly Video Model brings AI-powered features to video editing software like Premiere Pro. The new model, available in beta later this year, offers editors enhanced workflows to explore creative ideas, fill timeline gaps, and add new elements to footage.

articles.title: MISTRAL RELEASES PIXTRAL 12B, ITS FIRST MULTIMODAL MODEL
articles.summary: French AI startup Mistral has launched Pixtral 12B, a 12-billion-parameter multimodal model capable of processing both images and text. Available via GitHub and Hugging Face, the model can be fine-tuned and used under an Apache 2.0 license. Its release follows Mistral's $645 million funding round and positions the company as a significant player in Europe's AI landscape.

articles.title: FASHION DATASET FOR PERSONALIZATION
articles.summary: This dataset, generated using large language models, tailors outfits to different occasions, styles, and body types, offering high-quality and relevant suggestions.

articles.title: 3D SCENE RECONSTRUCTION
articles.summary: Researchers are enhancing 3D scene reconstruction methods like Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (GS) by introducing uncertainty estimation techniques. These methods, while delivering high-quality renders, struggle with handling uncertainties from noise, occlusions, and camera inaccuracies.

articles.title: EXTENDING LLMS' CONTEXT LIMIT
articles.summary: This paper introduces Hierarchical cOntext MERging (HOMER), a new approach designed to extend the context limit of large language models without requiring additional training.

articles.title: IS THE FUTURE OF DATA TEAMS CENTRALIZED, DECENTRALIZED, OR HYBRID? ANALYTICS LEADERS WEIGH IN
articles.summary: For data teams to continue delivering value, they need to evolve with the time. This panel discussion [10] featuring leaders from AtScale, Bayer, and Evoke will offer fresh outlooks on how to modernize the data team: operating models, data maturity assessments, DataOps, semantic layers, ethical considerations, and more. Tune in live on

articles.title: September 25.
LLAMA OMNI
articles.summary: Llama Omni is a full speech in-out model based on Llama 3.1 8B that can run at extremely low latency and still deliver high quality responses.

articles.title: AWS AI STACK
articles.summary: A ready-to-use, full-stack boilerplate project for building serverless AI applications on AWS. It is a great fit for those seeking a trusted AWS foundation for AI apps and access to powerful LLM models via Bedrock that keeps your app's data separate from model providers.

articles.title: INTERNET OF AGENTS FOR MULTI-AGENT COLLABORATION
articles.summary: Internet of Agents (IoA) is a new framework designed to improve multi-agent collaboration by integrating diverse third-party agents more effectively.

articles.title: BOOSTING MODELS WITH DIVERSE GENERATIVE DATA
articles.summary: DiverGen is a new strategy for creating generative datasets to improve instance segmentation models. Unlike costly manual annotations, it uses generative models to produce diverse data, addressing overfitting and enhancing model performance.

articles.title: ELON MUSK SAYS TESLA HAS ‘NO NEED' TO LICENSE XAI MODELS
articles.summary: Elon Musk has denied reports that Tesla will share revenue with his AI startup xAI to use its AI models. He clarified that Tesla has benefited from xAI engineers but doesn't need to license xAI's models. Musk emphasized that xAI's large models cannot run on Tesla's vehicle computers.

articles.title: APPLE IS THINKING ABOUT A RIVAL TO META RAY-BAN GLASSES
articles.summary: Apple may develop non-AR smart glasses, potentially competing with Meta's $299 Ray-Ban glasses, which don't have AR capabilities. Meta's glasses include features like a camera and an AI chatbot. With less complexity, Apple's non-AR glasses could be cheaper, lighter, and offer better battery life.

articles.title: DEVELOP YOUR AI MODELS LOCALLY WITH DELL'S PRECISION AI-READY WORKSTATIONS
articles.summary: Want the flexibility to experiment with AI, without racking up costs? Dell Precision has the hardware you need to prototype, develop, and

articles.title: fine-tune AI anywhere. See the specs
OPENAI IN TALKS TO RAISE FUNDS AT $150B VALUATION
articles.summary: OpenAI is in talks to raise $6.5B from investors at a valuation of $150B.

articles.title: ELL
articles.summary: Ell is a new package from an ex-OpenAI scientist for managing prompts as code.

articles.title: EMOTIVE PIANO MUSIC GENERATION
articles.summary: This work uses a two stage model to disentangle emotive performances in piano music generation.
